import sqlite3
from pathlib import Path


ROOT = Path(__file__).parents[1]


def load(name):
    return (ROOT / "sql" / name).read_text(encoding="utf-8")


def payload(site, observed, received, value):
    return {
        "site_id": site,
        "sensor_id": "meter-4",
        "event_id": "reused-31",
        "observed_at": observed,
        "received_at": received,
        "value": value,
    }


def test_cross_site_corrections_remain_in_observed_hours():
    db = sqlite3.connect(":memory:")
    db.executescript(load("telemetry_schema.sql"))
    write = load("upsert_reading.sql")
    db.execute(write, payload("coast", 300, 5000, 10.0))
    db.execute(write, payload("coast", 600, 6000, 12.0))
    db.execute(write, payload("coast", 7100, 5500, 99.0))
    db.execute(write, payload("inland", 3900, 7000, 30.0))

    rows = db.execute(
        load("hourly_rollup.sql"),
        {"window_start": 0, "window_end": 7200},
    ).fetchall()
    assert rows == [
        ("coast", "1970-01-01T00:00:00Z", 12.0, 1),
        ("inland", "1970-01-01T01:00:00Z", 30.0, 1),
    ]
